top_signals.title: EasyJet CEO Sees Increased Caution on Summer Bookings
top_signals.summary: EasyJet CEO Kenton Jarvis discusses summer travel bookings, jet fuel supplies and price hedging. The UK airline said it's 58% sold for the second half of fiscal 2026, down 2 percentage points from a year earlier. Jarvis speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
